case_title: BUNCE, CHRIS vs. VOLLRATH KARIN et al

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUNCE, CHRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLLRATH KARIN $6,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,100.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUNCE, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT VOLLRATH KARIN
